title: Shower Head [TESTSIEGER], Newentor High Pressure Shower Heads with 6 Modes, Power Shower Head Only, Universal Water Saving Large Showerhead
features: 🚿PREMIUM QUALITY HIGH PRESSURE SHOWER HEADS: The square handheld shower heads without shower hose are adopted by the scratch-resistant ABS pearlescent panel and glossy chrome-plated surface, making large shower heads lightweight and durable. Truly provide you and your family with a comfort and long-lasting bathroom showers.

🚿MULTIFUNCTIONAL SHOWER HEAD: 6 spray settings are available for this rainfall shower head increase pressure with single hand easily, suitable for hair washing, gentle shower, massage, child or pet bath, and bathroom cleaning etc. Freely customize your showering and enjoy desired spray performance with water saving shower head.

🚿SINGLE-HAND ADJUSTABLE SHOWER HEADS: Innovative button design of the massage shower head jet looks luxury with a neat little flick switch to change the shower flower, providing you, your child and your pets a pressure-relief and pleasure bath.
🚿EASY CLEANING BIG SHOWE HEADS: Universal shower head are equipped with self-cleaning silicone nozzles, Simply wipe it with a towel or sponge for one step saving your time and effort.

🚿ONE-STEP INSTALLATION SHOWER HEADS ONLY: Newentor power shower head for the bathroom pressure boosting fit universally for most standard shower hose with global 1/2 interface and most high pressure shower heads holders, connected manually in minutes without any tool. Square outline of the powerful flow shower heads let you enjoy a convenient and invigorated showering. 1 years guarantee for added peace of mind.
